cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the basketball court. The problem gives us several pieces of information, so I need to go through each one carefully. First, Richard woke up at 5am. That means he wasn't up before that, so he couldn't have done anything before 5am. But waking up doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something immediately; he might have taken some time to get ready. Next, Elizabeth saw Richard taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 5am to 7am. So during that two-hour window, he was definitely at the Leaning Tower of Pisa. Therefore, he couldn't have been at the basketball court during that time because he was photographed elsewhere. Then there's Lisa, who saw Richard fixing their computer at the electronic store from 3pm to 7pm. So from 3pm to 7pm, he was at the store working on a computer. That blocks off that entire four-hour period as well. He couldn't have gone to the basketball court during those hours because he was busy at the store. Leslie saw Richard
